summary: Code review of MEA Analysis fixes. Verified 6/9 features are correctly implemented. Found 3 issues in Light Stimulus tab that need fixing: Brush components not removed, missing tickFormatter on XAxis, and drug overlay missing ifOverflow='hidden' with clipped bounds.

design_issues.screen: Light Stimulus tab - Spike Trace and Burst Trace charts
issues: Brush/sliding bar still present (lines 2102-2115, 2255-2268) - should be removed per requirement
Drug overlay missing ifOverflow='hidden' and clipped bounds (lines 2082, 2235)

action_items: Remove Brush components from Light Stimulus tab charts (lines 2102-2115 and 2255-2268)
Add tickFormatter={(v) => v.toFixed(1)} to XAxis in Light Stimulus charts (after line 2077 and line 2230)

Update drug overlay in Light Stimulus charts to use clipped bounds with ifOverflow='hidden': Change line 2082 to: {drugWindow && <ReferenceArea x1={Math.max(drugWindow.start, (lightZoomDomain?.[0] || 0))} x2={Math.min(drugWindow.end, (lightZoomDomain?.[1] || duration))} fill="#a855f7" fillOpacity={0.15} ifOverflow="hidden" />}
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PASS: SaveRecording accepts isMEA prop and uses accentColor (SaveRecording.js lines 33, 39)
✅ PASS: Reset button only shows when zoomed (isZoomed check on lines 234, 260, 336, 362, 436, 460, 528, 562)
✅ PASS: Time axis shows 1 decimal place in main chart components (tickFormatter on lines 276, 378, 478, 580)
✅ PASS: Drug overlay uses ifOverflow='hidden' in main charts (lines 291, 302, 393, 404, 490, 495, 592, 597)
❌ FAIL: Brush still exists in Light Stimulus tab charts (lines 2102-2115, 2255-2268)
❌ FAIL: Light Stimulus charts XAxis missing tickFormatter with toFixed(1)
❌ FAIL: Drug overlay in Light Stimulus charts missing ifOverflow='hidden' and clipped bounds
context_for_next_testing_agent: Main chart components (SpikeTraceChartWithZoom, BurstTraceChartWithZoom, SpikeRasterPlotWithZoom, BurstRasterPlotWithZoom) are correctly implemented with no Brush, proper tickFormatter, and clipped drug overlays. Light Stimulus tab charts (around lines 2020-2270) still have the old implementation and need to be updated to match the pattern used in the main chart components.

2_save_recording_ismea.details: SaveRecording called with isMEA={true} at line 2685

3_save_recording_accent_color.details: SaveRecording.js lines 33, 39 - isMEA prop determines accentColor (#10b981 emerald vs var(--sem-accent))

4_brush_removed_main_charts.details: No Brush in SpikeTraceChartWithZoom, BurstTraceChartWithZoom, SpikeRasterPlotWithZoom, BurstRasterPlotWithZoom

5_brush_removed_light_stimulus.details: Brush still present at lines 2102-2115 and 2255-2268 in Light Stimulus tab

6_reset_button_only_when_zoomed.details: isZoomed check implemented correctly in all WithZoom components

8_time_axis_1_decimal_light_stimulus.details: XAxis in Light Stimulus charts (lines 2070-2077, 2223-2230) missing tickFormatter

9_drug_overlay_clipped_main.details: Drug overlay uses Math.max/Math.min with zoomDomain and ifOverflow='hidden' in main charts

10_drug_overlay_clipped_light_stimulus.details: Drug overlay at lines 2082 and 2235 missing ifOverflow='hidden' and clipped bounds

brush_removal: Lines 2102-2115: Remove entire <Brush .../> element from Spike Trace chart
Lines 2255-2268: Remove entire <Brush .../> element from Burst Trace chart
tick_formatter: Line 2077: Add tickFormatter={(v) => v.toFixed(1)} to XAxis
Line 2230: Add tickFormatter={(v) => v.toFixed(1)} to XAxis
drug_overlay: Line 2082: Change from {drugWindow && <ReferenceArea x1={drugWindow.start} x2={drugWindow.end} fill="#a855f7" fillOpacity={0.15} />} to {drugWindow && <ReferenceArea x1={Math.max(drugWindow.start, (lightZoomDomain?.[0] || 0))} x2={Math.min(drugWindow.end, (lightZoomDomain?.[1] || duration))} fill="#a855f7" fillOpacity={0.15} ifOverflow="hidden" />}
